subject: Mathematics
description: classify whole numbers, integers, and rational numbers using a visual representation such as a Venn diagram to describe relationships between sets of numbers

subject: Mathematics
description: identify a number, its opposite, and its absolute value

subject: Mathematics
description: locate, compare, and order integers and rational numbers using a number line

subject: Mathematics
description: order a set of rational numbers arising from mathematical and real-world contexts

subject: Mathematics
description: recognize that dividing by a rational number and multiplying by its reciprocal result in equivalent values

subject: Mathematics
description: determine, with and without computation, whether a quantity is increased or decreased when multiplied by a fraction, including values greater than or less than one

subject: Mathematics
description: represent integer operations with concrete models and connect the actions with the models to standardized algorithms

subject: Mathematics
description: add, subtract, multiply, and divide integers fluently

subject: Mathematics
description: compare two rules verbally, numerically, graphically, and symbolically in order to develop the concept of a ratio

subject: Mathematics
description: apply qualitative and quantitative reasoning to solve prediction and comparison of real-world problems involving ratios and rates

subject: Mathematics
description: give examples of ratios as multiplicative comparisons of two quantities describing the same attribute

subject: Mathematics
description: give examples of rates as the comparison by division of two quantities having different attributes, including rates as quotients

subject: Mathematics
description: represent mathematical and real-world problems involving ratios and rates using scale factors, tables, graphs, and proportions

subject: Mathematics
description: identify independent and dependent quantities from tables and graphs

subject: Mathematics
description: write an equation that represents the relationship between independent and dependent quantities from a table

subject: Mathematics
description: generate equivalent numerical expressions using order of operations, including whole number exponents and prime factorization

subject: Mathematics
description: write one-variable, one-step equations and inequalities to represent constraints or conditions within problems

subject: Mathematics
description: extend previous knowledge of triangles and their properties to include the sum of angles of a triangle, the relationship between the lengths of sides and measures of angles in a triangle, and determining when three lengths form a triangle

subject: Mathematics
description: represent numeric data graphically, including dot plots, stem-and-leaf plots, histograms, and box plots

subject: Mathematics
description: use the graphical representation of numeric data to describe the center, spread, and shape of the data distribution

subject: Mathematics
description: interpret numeric data summarized in dot plots, stem-and-leaf plots, histograms, and box plots
